caption: Directional concordance of the original-cohort mean model-estimated CATE across CausalForestDML, LinearDML, and exploratory CausalPFN.  All three estimators shared the same direction for 18 of 19 dataset--exposure comparisons: 9 of 9 in MIMIC-III and 9 of 10 in PhysioNet.  PhysioNet shock was the sole exception.  Direction agreement does not imply equal magnitude, uncertainty, estimator equivalence, or causal validity.
